targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(e.ts, $__interval),
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '32/5/1') AS "Улица",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/7') AS "Гостиная",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/13') AS "Кухня",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/4') AS "Спальня 1эт",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/22') AS "Настя",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/19') AS "Тим",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/16') AS "Кабинет",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/34') AS "Спальня 2эт"
FROM events e
WHERE e.house_id = 'house'
  AND e.ga IN (
    '32/5/1','33/1/7','33/1/13','33/1/4','33/1/22','33/1/19','33/1/16','33/1/34'
  )
  AND $__timeFilter(e.ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(e.ts, $__interval),
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/8') AS "Гостиная",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/14') AS "Кухня",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/11') AS "Ванная 1эт",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '33/1/32') AS "Ванная 2эт",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '32/5/3') AS "Улица"
FROM events e
WHERE e.house_id = 'house'
  AND e.ga IN ('33/1/8','33/1/14','33/1/11','33/1/32','32/5/3')
  AND $__timeFilter(e.ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  CASE o.ga
    WHEN '32/5/1' THEN 'Температура'
    WHEN '32/5/2' THEN 'Ощущается'
    WHEN '32/5/3' THEN 'Влажность'
    WHEN '32/5/4' THEN 'Давление'
    WHEN '32/5/6' THEN 'Ветер м/с'
    WHEN '32/5/7' THEN 'Порывы м/с'
    WHEN '32/5/8' THEN 'Описание'
    ELSE o.name
  END AS metric,
  cs.value #>> '{}' AS value,
  cs.ts AS updated
FROM objects o
JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
WHERE o.house_id = 'house'
  AND o.ga IN ('32/5/1','32/5/2','32/5/3','32/5/4','32/5/6','32/5/7','32/5/8')
ORDER BY o.ga

panels.title: Тёплые полы: температура В ПОЛУ (1/3/*) vs уставка
Зоны ТП (пол, не воздух)

targets.rawSql:
WITH floor_t AS (
  SELECT o.ga, replace(o.name, 'Темп - ', '') AS zone, (cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision AS floor_c
  FROM objects o
  JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
  WHERE o.house_id = 'house'
    AND o.tags LIKE '%heat%' AND o.tags LIKE '%temp%'
    AND o.tags NOT LIKE '%setpoint%'
    AND o.ga LIKE '1/3/%'
),
sp AS (
  SELECT o.ga, replace(o.name, 'Уставка ТП - ', '') AS zone, (cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision AS setpoint_c
  FROM objects o
  JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
  WHERE o.house_id = 'house' AND o.tags LIKE '%setpoint%'
),
rel AS (
  SELECT replace(replace(o.name, 'ТП - ', ''), ' :status', '') AS zone,
         CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS relay_on
  FROM objects o
  JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
  WHERE o.house_id = 'house'
    AND o.tags LIKE '%heat%' AND o.tags LIKE '%status%'
)
SELECT
  CASE WHEN coalesce(r.relay_on, 0) = 1 THEN '🔥' ELSE '❄' END AS icon,
  f.zone,
  round(f.floor_c::numeric, 2) AS floor_c,
  round(s.setpoint_c::numeric, 1) AS setpoint_c,
  CASE WHEN coalesce(r.relay_on, 0) = 1 THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS relay
FROM floor_t f
LEFT JOIN sp s ON trim(both FROM s.zone) = trim(both FROM f.zone)
LEFT JOIN rel r ON r.zone = f.zone
  OR r.zone = replace(f.zone, '1 этаж', '1 этажа')
  OR replace(r.zone, '1 этажа', '1 этаж') = f.zone
ORDER BY f.zone

panels.description: 🔥 греет / ❄ выкл. floor_c — температура В ПЛЁНКЕ ПОЛА (1/3/*), не воздух в комнате. setpoint — уставка комфорта (1/6/*).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(e.ts, $__interval),
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/3/7') AS "Кухня",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/3/5') AS "Гостиная 1",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/3/6') AS "Гостиная 2",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/3/4') AS "Спальня",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/3/12') AS "Настя",
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/3/13') AS "Тим"
FROM events e
WHERE e.house_id = 'house'
  AND e.ga IN ('1/3/7','1/3/5','1/3/6','1/3/4','1/3/12','1/3/13')
  AND $__timeFilter(e.ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(e.ts, $__interval),
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/5/7') AS "Кухня",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/5/5') AS "Гостиная1",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/5/6') AS "Гостиная2",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/5/4') AS "Спальня",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/5/12') AS "Настя",
  max(CASE WHEN lower(e.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FILTER (WHERE e.ga = '1/5/13') AS "Тим"
FROM events e
WHERE e.house_id = 'house'
  AND e.ga IN ('1/5/7','1/5/5','1/5/6','1/5/4','1/5/12','1/5/13')
  AND $__timeFilter(e.ts)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
